# Short horizon — status: minor_revision

**Posture.** ~30-day stance: defer-by-default on the June NVDA tranche pending three hard gates (Israeli tax-substrate refresh by 2026-06-08, attorney retainer by 2026-06-10, analyst-substrate citation repair by 2026-06-15). Park the 2026-06-17 729-share RSU vest cash in SGOV pending patient UCITS deployment. Small parameterized UCITS top-up (CSPX or ACWD) permitted on RSU-vest proceeds while sector-cap and RSI conditions hold (preserved from prior cycle). Do NOT trim SCHD despite RSI 73.4 exit signal — capital-preservation theme (US-situs estate tail) wins over momentum. No speculative_candidates this cycle: substrate not repaired and bear-won debate on substrate-first grounds means speculation cap cannot be honored with disciplined risk_ceiling_check evidence.

Failure auto-suspends all equity gates.

- **Estimated 2026-06-17 RSU vest tax (USD)**: 78386.0 usd (stated 2026-06-02; revisit 2026-06-17) — TaxAnalyst per-vest estimate: 729 sh × $215.05 ≈ $156,771 gross × ~50% blended marginal (47% top bracket + 3% surtax; NI ceiling exhausted) under Section 102 Capital track FMV-at-vest ordinary slice.

## Themes
- **Defer-by-default execution stance on the June NVDA tranche** (lean_into) — Three open substrate gates + Commerce export-loophole news + neutral macro + Section 102 24-month trip-wire risk all point to default-defer over default-execute.
- **RSI-stretched broad-market and value ETFs — avoid as fill targets this cycle** (lean_away_from) — SCHD RSI 73.4 (exit), VTV 71.19 (exit), VOO 69.16 at 52w high, QQQM 67.44, SCHG 68.25, SPMO 64.01. Hold what's held; don't add. (Note: technical analyst FAILED this cycle so RSI figures are from prior cycle and revalidation is pending.)
- **Commerce export-loophole closure — near-term NVDA pressure** (monitor) — NewsAnalyst materiality 0.55 with HIGH confidence. Real but not auto-actionable absent substrate gates clearing.
- **Failed-analyst remediation has explicit escalation** (lean_into) — SentimentAnalyst failed citations; TechnicalAnalyst FAILED; ConcentrationAnalyst missing plan_targets. Hard gate 2026-06-15 with auto-suspend authority.
- **Estate-document gates take precedence over financial realizations** (lean_into) — will_exists=false with 2 minors and tri-jurisdictional assets is asymmetric catastrophic-tail risk. Attorney retainer is a hard gate on next NVDA tranche.
- **Section 102 24-month clock is a hard constraint on the June tranche** (lean_into) — Any June tranche must be lot-aware: pre-2024 grants (213000, 246477) only qualify for capital track; selling later grants within 24 months re-classifies to ordinary 47%+.

- **NVDA June tranche — execute only if THREE gates clear; otherwise auto-defer** [if(tax_memo_refreshed_by_2026-06-08 AND attorney_retainer_engaged_by_2026-06-10 AND analyst_substrate_repaired_by_2026-06-15) then execute up to 200 sh pre-vest from pre-2024 grants only; else defer to post-2026-06-17]: 200 sh ceiling pre-vest, conditional on all three substrate gates AND lot-aware grant-date eligibility (Section 102 24mo cleared). ## Rationale
Short horizon is mechanical and substrate-gated this cycle. The bear-won debate is decisive: three open substrate gates (tax memo, attorney retainer, analyst remediation) + broad ETFs at 52w highs + Commerce export-loophole news + neutral macro + Section 102 24-month risk all mean default-defer-and-park, not execute-on-schedule. Material refinements vs prior draft #19: (a) preserve the parameterized UCITS top-up trigger from prior cycle (accepted delta retained); (b) refresh per-vest tax estimate to TaxAnalyst's $78,386 figure (prior $19,500 was undersized); (c) refresh days-to-vest to 15; (d) add W-8BEN currency verification (TaxAnalyst flagged as untracked); (e) re-add June RSU withholding adequacy check (lineage to prior draft #18); (f) add attorney retainer deadline as a tracked countdown target. No speculative candidates: substrate is not in a state where the speculation cap (≤0.10% of net worth ≈ $3,800 max; ≤3 concurrent) can be honored with disciplined risk_ceiling_check evidence, and pushing speculation while equity gates may auto-suspend would be incoherent. Confidence MEDIUM: tax-substrate domain files carry last_verified=1900-01-01 pending domain-refresh; sentiment+technical analysts FAILED this cycle.
